official_functions.role: Write the full Configuration serverbound framed finish_configuration packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed finish_configuration packet
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed finish_configuration packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed finish_configuration packet
Read the official serverbound terminal flag
Read the official clientbound terminal flag

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id for ServerboundFinishConfigurationPacket.INSTANCE.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id for ClientboundFinishConfigurationPacket.INSTANCE.
The official Configuration protocol codecs dispatch the framed packet ids back to their finish_configuration packet classes.
The official packet INSTANCE terminal flags are recorded in the generated answer artifact for both directions.
The framed bytes, packet table ids, remaining decode bytes, and terminal flags are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove the runtime Configuration-to-Play transition, registry hydration, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed terminal contract to infer initialized client/server state transition or Play readiness.
